name: python-refactor
description: Agentic Python codebase analysis suite. Skills: python-refactor:orchestrate (full pipeline with issue filing and cleanup), python-refactor:measure (static analysis via radon/vulture/bandit/semgrep/skylos/grimp), python-refactor:hunt-bugs (bug exploration + Hypothesis PBT), python-refactor:architecture (deep-module analysis + GitHub RFCs), python-refactor:plan-refactor (prioritized refactor plan), python-refactor:cleanup (remove all plugin output and tool caches). All output goes to .python-refactor/ at the project root (git-ignored). Run python-refactor:orchestrate to chain all phases automatically, or invoke any skill individually.
